title: HOMCOM Display Cabinet Case for Home Office, 60x80cm, Black and White
features: Four adjustable shelves: With seven different positions to set in this glass cabinet, set up how you want, to fit in differently-sized items.
Glass doors: Both move to the side, allowing easy access inside, whilst keeping everything protected. Smooth groove handles for opening and closing.
Particle board frame: Ensures a tough and robust structure, making it safe and reliable for keeping everything displayed and in place on the wall.
Wall mountable: Great for places with little room, saving floor space. Dimensions: 60H x 80W x 9.5Dcm. Each door: 57.5H x 39Wcm.
Maximum load 2kg per shelf. Assembly required.
description: Product Description It's time to get your ornaments displayed and organised - look no further than this wall cabinet from HOMCOM. Its five-tier design means there is plenty of room for keeping everything you want safely on show, with each shelf being able to adjust to suit what you need to hold. The structure is crafted from particle board, so it is tough and durable, and the front is fitted with two moving glass doors, keeping everything protected and easy to access when wanted. Easy to put in place, this classic home furnishing will keep all your favourite pieces beautifully displayed. Spice up your home office with our exciting line of computer desks and comfortable chairs, or upgrade your kitchen with our rolling trolley carts and storage racks. Beautiful leather ottomans, furniture options, and decorative accessories are all available to add a new dimension to whatever space you are trying to complete. Saves space in your home/office, without taking up any floor space Features adjustable shelves, providing room for both small and large objects Two large glass doors, keeps the inside protected and slides open for easy access Tough and sturdy particle board frame, attaches to the wall easily Assembly required Brand HOMCOM Colour Black and white Materials Particle board and glass Dimensions 60H x 80W x 9.5Dcm. Each door: 57.5H x 39Wcm. Inside: 77W x 7.5Dcm Maximum load per shelf 2kg Custom label 833-761BK Good Quality We use selected materials and qualified factories to produce our products, and each product has been tested many times throughout the production process to ensure that it is intact. Nice-looking We work hard to create popular, chic, and innovative items that can pass the test of time and help you live better. With stability,comfort in mind, our products will be your best choice. Versatile Use We create simple but unique designs to make our furniture blend perfectly with your home environment whether it's from your kitchen to your dining room, or from your bedroom to your living room. Everything in Order We dedicate to helping you keep everything well organized and try to offer you storage space as much as possible. Refresh your home immediately with the storage space we provided!

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Always follow the assembly instructions carefully. Ensure the wall can support the weight of the cabinet before mounting. Do not exceed the maximum load capacity of 2kg per shelf. Keep the area around the cabinet clear during assembly to avoid potential hazards.
